title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
